landing.worksWith: Works with your favorite AI tools
landing.featuredPacksDescription: Our most popular curated bundles, ready to deploy.
landing.howDescription: From browsing to deploying in under 5 minutes.
landing.step1Description: Explore themed packs or build a custom selection from 232+ specialized agents.
landing.step2Description: Secure checkout with Stripe. One-time payment — no subscriptions, no recurring fees.
landing.step3Description: Get an email with a download link. Unzip, copy to your tool's agent directory, and go.
landing.featuresDescription: Specialized AI agents that never sleep, never complain, and always deliver.
landing.feature1Description: Each agent is a specialized expert in their domain — not a generic prompt template. Real workflows, real deliverables, real results.
landing.feature2Description: Download your agents as .md files and install them in your favorite AI tool in under 60 seconds. No setup, no configuration, no hassle.
landing.feature3Description: Battle-tested workflows, success metrics, and communication styles. Every agent comes with proven processes and measurable outcomes.
landing.feature4Description: Themed packs that work together — a startup MVP team, a marketing agency, a DevSecOps crew. Buy a full team in one click.
landing.feature5Description: Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Aider, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, and more. One download, any tool.
landing.feature6Description: Don't need a full pack? Mix and match individual agents at $5 each. Build a custom team that fits your exact workflow.
landing.showcaseDescription: A glimpse of the 232+ specialized agents waiting to join your workflow.
landing.morePacksDescription: Specialized bundles for every use case.
landing.testimonial1Text: The Startup MVP pack saved us weeks. We had a full dev team's expertise in Claude Code within minutes of downloading. Absolutely game-changing.
landing.testimonial2Text: We bought the Marketing Agency pack and it transformed how our team works. Every agent feels like hiring a senior specialist without the salary.
landing.testimonial3Text: The DevSecOps pack is incredibly well-curated. The security agents found vulnerabilities our team missed. Worth every penny.
landing.faq1Q: What exactly do I get when I buy a pack?
landing.faq1A: You get a ZIP file containing .md files — one per agent — with full personality definitions, workflows, and deliverables. Each file includes installation instructions for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and other supported tools.
landing.faq2Q: How do I install the agents?
landing.faq2A: After downloading, simply copy the .md files to your tool's agent directory. For Claude Code, that's ~/.claude/agents/. For Cursor, it's ~/.cursor/rules/. The download includes a README with instructions for every supported tool.
landing.faq3A: No. Every pack is a one-time payment. You download the agents and they're yours forever. No recurring fees, no lock-in.
landing.faq4Q: Can I buy individual agents instead of a pack?
landing.faq4A: Yes! Visit the Build Your Own page to mix and match individual agents at $5 each. Select only what you need and checkout with the same instant download process.
landing.faq5Q: Do the agents work with my AI tool?
landing.faq5A: The agents work with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Aider, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Antigravity, and more. The .md format is universally compatible with any tool that supports agent/persona files.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Build Your Dream Team?
landing.ctaDescription: Browse our packs or build a custom selection. Get your agents delivered to your inbox instantly after purchase.

settings.mustBeOwner: You must be a team owner to invite new members.
